nasb.text: Now Herod and Pilate became friends with one another that very day; for before they had been enemies with each other.

esv.text: And Herod and Pilate became friends with each other that very day, for before this they had been at enmity with each other.

cnv.text: 希律和彼拉多從前原是彼此為仇，在那一天就成了朋友。

ccb.text: 希律和彼拉多向来互相敌视，但在那一天竟化敌为友。

csbs.text: 在这一天，希律和彼拉多竟互相成了朋友；原来他们两个人一向是彼此有仇的。
